title: First Freedom: The Fight for Religious Liberty
original_title: First Freedom: The Fight for Religious Liberty
overview: First Freedom: The Fight for Religious Liberty is the story of how the most basic of human freedoms - freedom of conscience - was codified for the first time in human history as an inalienable human right protected by law.
